image_resolution.source: openvla_utils.OPENVLA_IMAGE_SIZE=224; LIBERO agentview_image is 256 → resized to 224 before model

max_episode_steps.source: LIBERO benchmark spec: libero_spatial/object/goal=220 steps; libero_10/90=520 steps (set per-suite in eval harness)

camera.source: moojink eval: num_images_in_input=2 (primary+wrist); LIBERO env default cameras

prompt_format.value: In: What action should the robot take to {instruction.lower()}?\nOut:

image_flip_180deg.source: LIBERO renders upside-down relative to training data; our remap_obs_to_libero applies 180° flip in policy_server.py

image_resize_before_model.source: prepare_images_for_vla resizes 256→224 (LIBERO agentview native 256, model expects 224)

center_crop.source: moojink OFT finetuning used center-crop augmentation (config.center_crop default True matches training)

gripper_post_processing.source: openvla/experiments/robot/robot_utils.py normalize_gripper_action + invert_gripper_action; LIBERO OSC_POSE convention

wait_steps.source: LIBERO eval standard: 10 zero-action steps for objects to settle before policy starts (from robosuite convention)
